name: Near standard rate crossover - HK$2,000,000 single
description: At HK$2M, progressive and standard rates are very close. Progressive is still slightly lower. This tests the boundary of the standard rate cap mechanism.

sources.description: Manual calculation: MPF capped at 18000. Net income = 1982000. NCI = 1982000 - 132000 = 1850000. Progressive: 16000 + 1650000*17% = 16000 + 280500 = 296500. Standard: 1982000 * 15% = 297300. Tax = min(296500, 297300) = 296500 (progressive barely wins).
